name: Hawaii Dental Assistant Registration
description: Complete guide to dental assistant requirements in Hawaii — fees, DANB certification, and radiography permits.

address.description: DCCA, PVL Licensing Branch, P.O. Box 3469, Honolulu, HI 96801

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate from CODA-accredited program or documentation of on-the-job training hours.

requiredDocuments.name: DANB Certification
requiredDocuments.description: Official CDA certification from the Dental Assisting National Board, if applicable.

mainEntity.name: Does Hawaii require a dental assistant license?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, Hawaii does not require state licensure for general dental assistants. However, expanded functions and radiography may require permits or certifications.

mainEntity.name: Is DANB certification recognized in Hawaii?

acceptedAnswer.text: DANB certification may not be directly recognized, DANB CDA certification is not directly referenced in state regulations in Hawaii.

mainEntity.name: Can I take dental x-rays in Hawaii?

acceptedAnswer.text: Radiography requirements vary — check with the state board.

mainEntity.name: How much does it cost to become a dental assistant in Hawaii?

acceptedAnswer.text: There is no state application fee for general dental assistants in Hawaii. However, DANB CDA exam costs $450, and radiography certifications may have additional fees.
